allow: PowerShell($urls = @\('http://localhost:3000','http://localhost:3000/empresa','http://localhost:3000/obras','http://localhost:3000/contato'\); foreach \($u in $urls\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; Write-Output "$u $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "$u ERROR" } })

PowerShell($urls = @\('http://localhost:3000','http://localhost:3000/empresa','http://localhost:3000/obras','http://localhost:3000/contato'\); foreach \($u in $urls\) { try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $u -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 15; Write-Output "$u $\($r.StatusCode\)" } catch { Write-Output "$u ERROR $\($_.Exception.Message\)" } })

PowerShell(try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/empresa' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 20\).StatusCode } catch { "ERR $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/sequence/frame_001.jpg' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10\).StatusCode } catch { "ERR $\($_.Exception.Message\)" }; try { \(Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'http://localhost:3000/sequence/frame_110.jpg' -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10\).StatusCode } catch { "ERR $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })
